mapper.select: select * from ${tableName} where datatime >= #{startTime} and datatime <=#{endTime}
select station,datatime,validdate,vti,rain from ${tableName} where station = #{station} and datatime = #{dataTime} and validdate <=#{endDateTime} order by validdate

select station,datatime,validdate,vti,tp as rain from ${tableName} where station = #{station} and datatime = #{dataTime} and validdate >= #{startDateTime} and validdate <=#{endDateTime} order by validdate
select station from public.grib_check_value_tab where datatime = #{dataTime} and station = #{station} and datasource = #{dataSource} and hour = #{hour}
mapper.insert: insert into public.grib_check_value_tab(station, dataTime, inserttime, dataSource, hour, zone, zone2, rain24h24, rain24tn24, rain24m24, rain24f24, rain24h48, rain24tn48, rain24m48, rain24f48, rain24h72, rain24tn72, rain24m72, rain24f72, rain24h96, rain24tn96, rain24m96, rain24f96, rain24h120, rain24tn120, rain24m120, rain24f120, rain24h144, rain24tn144, rain24m144, rain24f144, rain24h168, rain24tn168, rain24m168, rain24f168, rain24h192, rain24tn192, rain24m192, rain24f192, rain24h216, rain24tn216, rain24m216, rain24f216, rain24h240, rain24tn240, rain24m240, rain24f240) values(#{station}, #{dataTime}, #{inserttime}, #{dataSource}, #{hour}, #{zone}, #{zone2}, #{rain24h24}, #{rain24tn24}, #{rain24m24}, #{rain24f24}, #{rain24h48}, #{rain24tn48}, #{rain24m48}, #{rain24f48}, #{rain24h72}, #{rain24tn72}, #{rain24m72}, #{rain24f72}, #{rain24h96}, #{rain24tn96}, #{rain24m96}, #{rain24f96}, #{rain24h120}, #{rain24tn120}, #{rain24m120}, #{rain24f120}, #{rain24h144}, #{rain24tn144}, #{rain24m144}, #{rain24f144}, #{rain24h168}, #{rain24tn168}, #{rain24m168}, #{rain24f168}, #{rain24h192}, #{rain24tn192}, #{rain24m192}, #{rain24f192}, #{rain24h216}, #{rain24tn216}, #{rain24m216}, #{rain24f216}, #{rain24h240}, #{rain24tn240}, #{rain24m240}, #{rain24f240})
mapper.update: update public.grib_check_value_tab set station = #{station}, dataTime = #{dataTime}, inserttime = #{inserttime}, dataSource = #{dataSource}, hour = #{hour}, zone = #{zone}, zone2 = #{zone2}, rain24h24 = #{rain24h24}, rain24tn24 = #{rain24tn24}, rain24m24 = #{rain24m24}, rain24f24 = #{rain24f24}, rain24h48 = #{rain24h48}, rain24tn48 = #{rain24tn48}, rain24m48 = #{rain24m48}, rain24f48 = #{rain24f48}, rain24h72 = #{rain24h72}, rain24tn72 = #{rain24tn72}, rain24m72 = #{rain24m72}, rain24f72 = #{rain24f72}, rain24h96 = #{rain24h96}, rain24tn96 = #{rain24tn96}, rain24m96 = #{rain24m96}, rain24f96 = #{rain24f96}, rain24h120 = #{rain24h120}, rain24tn120 = #{rain24tn120}, rain24m120 = #{rain24m120}, rain24f120 = #{rain24f120}, rain24h144 = #{rain24h144}, rain24tn144 = #{rain24tn144}, rain24m144 = #{rain24m144}, rain24f144 = #{rain24f144}, rain24h168 = #{rain24h168}, rain24tn168 = #{rain24tn168}, rain24m168 = #{rain24m168}, rain24f168 = #{rain24f168}, rain24h192 = #{rain24h192}, rain24tn192 = #{rain24tn192}, rain24m192 = #{rain24m192}, rain24f192 = #{rain24f192}, rain24h216 = #{rain24h216}, rain24tn216 = #{rain24tn216}, rain24m216 = #{rain24m216}, rain24f216 = #{rain24f216}, rain24h240 = #{rain24h240}, rain24tn240 = #{rain24tn240}, rain24m240 = #{rain24m240}, rain24f240 = #{rain24f240} where datatime = #{dataTime} and station = #{station} and datasource = #{dataSource} and hour = #{hour}
